name: GOLFTEC Highlands Ranch
address: 2030 E County Line Rd Suite L, Highlands Ranch, CO 80126
about: GOLFTEC Highlands Ranch is a technology-driven golf training facility specializing in data-backed instruction, club fitting, and practice. Utilizing advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed video, and launch monitors, coaches provide precise swing analysis and personalized game plans. The venue offers a structured learning environment with professional coaching, aiming to help golfers of all levels improve their mechanics and on-course performance. Services include private lessons, practice memberships, and custom club fitting, all designed for measurable skill development. Pricing is based on lesson packages and fitting sessions, with a pro shop offering gear at a 10% discount for members.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for precise swing analysis
Personalized coaching with data-driven improvement strategies
Structured practice sessions with coach-designed training plans
On-site club fitting for optimized equipment performance

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service mentioned; BYOB not indicated

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own clubs for lessons and practice. Club fitting services are available if you need equipment tailored to your game.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of on-site food or drink services, and BYOB policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As an indoor training facility, GOLFTEC does not offer 18-hole simulations. Sessions are focused on skill development through lessons, practice, and fitting.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is designed to accommodate golfers of all skill levels, including youth.
